Aa: Label on the reader's font-size / typography control. Short; the 'A' letters are a size metaphor — localize to the target language's equivalent if one exists, else keep 'Aa'.
min: Abbreviation for 'minutes' (as in '5 min' reading time). Use the locale's short unit for minutes.
or: Separator between two alternatives, e.g. 'Sign in or create an account'. Lowercase, standalone.
Note: Noun — a saved notebook note, not the verb 'to note'.
Content: Section title for the main body/content of a chapter.
Due: Adjective for a review/quiz that is scheduled now, e.g. '3 due'. Not a date.
Free: The free (non-paying) subscription tier. Opposite of the paid 'Pro' plan.
Pro: The paid subscription tier name ('ChapterFlow Pro'). A product name — usually keep untranslated.
HOOK: Reader block-type banner label for a narrative 'hook' section. Displayed in all caps.
COUNTERINTUITION: Reader block-type banner label for a 'counter-intuition' section. Displayed in all caps.
·: Middot separator between two inline pieces of metadata (e.g. author · chapter). Decorative.
